## What does this change?


## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (style + engine-purity rule + type-check)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run corpus:gate` passes (≥99% char & word on visible + held-out; no NFC/idempotency/fuzz failures)
- [ ] I did **not** read or tune against `corpus/heldout/`
- [ ] No secrets committed; the engine imports no Office.js
- [ ] If I changed the mapping data, I added a verified real-word corpus case
